column4: AIIR room not under negative pressure
Protective Environment room not under positive pressure
column8: ⚠ Warning: PE Room Must Be Positive

column4: AIIR or PE room missing linked anteroom ID
OR-CONV or OR-HYBRID ACH below 20 minimum
Anti-ligature room has fitting with no product rating
RTLS or IoT tag last seen > staleness threshold
Room Data Sheet mandatory parameters incomplete
Clinical space has no RTLS reader within coverage radius
Clinical waste route conflicts with clean corridor
Clinical room STC below minimum for use class
Clinical asset missing GMDN classification code

column1: # ─── MG: Medical Gas Pipeline System warnings ────────────────────────────────

column4: Terminal unit or pipeline missing gas type
Medical gas pipework must be inert-gas brazed
Zone Valve Box has no reference code
Calculated flow rate below NFPA 99 diversity requirement
Pipeline segment pressure drop exceeds allowable limit
EES branch designation not LIFE-SAF / CRIT / EQP-BR / NORMAL
ATS transfer time >10 s for LS/CR branch
Primary barrier missing Qualified Expert sign-off
Radiation-controlled access door missing interlock specification
Controlled area has no regulatory signage element placed
Controlled area boundary has no dosimetry monitoring post
Generic model in MRI suite area has no zone classification
MRI Faraday cage panel has no RF shielding method specified
